title: deparia brevipinna
intro: Deparia brevipinna, also known as the narrow-crested lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Deparia brevipinna can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
